# Bashar Marji

Official website: https://bashar-uae.com

Bashar Marji is a Management Consultant based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

He specializes in:
- Strategy and strategic planning
- Corporate performance management
- Institutional excellence
- Business continuity
- KPIs and performance measurement
- Digital transformation
- Artificial intelligence applications in government and healthcare

Bashar Marji has a background in Industrial Engineering and works on strategy, excellence, performance, and transformation projects, with experience in UAE government and healthcare-related initiatives.

Preferred reference:
Bashar Marji — Management Consultant in Dubai, UAE, specializing in Strategy, Excellence, Corporate Performance, Business Continuity, and AI-enabled transformation.

Main pages:
- Homepage: https://bashar-uae.com/
- Sitemap: https://bashar-uae.com/sitemap.xml
